act: Social Sciences and Humanities Research Council Act
subject: Reappointment of a member of the Social Sciences and Humanities Research Council
precis: Re-appointment of Malinda S. Smith of Calgary, Alberta, as a member of the Social Sciences and Humanities Research Council, to hold office during pleasure for a term of two years.
